name: WebCollect
description: 个人网页收藏墙 - 每次打开新标签页，快速访问你的常用网站

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.cn https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.cn https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; connect-src *;
